{{Infobox artifact
| name = Totem of the Dragon King
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Totem of the Dragon King Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Totem]] of the [[Dragon King]] is a powerful artifact that serves as a prize for winners of specific combat rounds. When activated, the totem manifests as a crown of energy above the user's head and produces a massive projection in the sky. This projection takes the form of a large, golden serpent composed of potent [[madra]] and can generate environmental effects such as sandstorms. The totem functions by channeling a portion of the [[Dragon King]]'s spirit, authority, and willpower, exerting significant physical and spiritual pressure on those nearby. While it can be used to launch attacks, such as a gust of sand shaped like a serpent, the manifestation eventually dissolves.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Totem]] of the [[Dragon King]] is a gold statue depicting a winged boy that holds a portion of the [[Dragon King]]'s authority and spirit. As a prize from the final round, the artifact can project an image of the [[Dragon King]] and its strength is dictated by Sophara's level of control. During a confrontation, the totem condensed into a crown above Sophara's head and filled the sky with enough power to stall the [[Sage of Red Faith]]. This massive projection eventually began to dissolve within the sky.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Totem of the Dragon King]] is a gold statue of a boy with broad [[dragon]]'s wings that releases a projection of the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Totem of the Dragon King]] carries a measure of the [[Dragon King]]'s spirit and authority.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The power of the [[Totem of the Dragon King]] is limited by how much Sophara can control.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]]’s [[Totem]] is a prize from the last round.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]]’s [[Totem]] condensed into a crown of power over Sophara's head.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]]’s [[Totem]] can stall the [[Sage of Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]]’s [[Totem]] filled the sky.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]]’s [[Totem]] began to dissolve in the sky.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
